NCT03900429.name: MAESTRO-NASH
NCT03900429.group: MASH F1B-F3, resmetirom 100 mg PO daily vs placebo (wk 52, NASH resolution + >=1-stage fibrosis improvement RR)

allOutcomes.title: NASH resolution at week 52 (primary, biopsy-confirmed, resmetirom 100 mg vs placebo, RR)

NCT03900429.snippet: Source: Harrison SA et al. NEJM 2024;390:497-509 (MAESTRO-NASH).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~1. Must be willing to participate in the study and provide written informed consent.~2. Male and female adults ≥ 18 years of age.~3. Suspected or confirmed diagnosis of NASH fibrosis suggested by the historical data. Meet one of the following criteria that is consistent with NASH liver fibrosis:~   1. Historical biochemical test for fibrosis: PRO-C3 >14 ng/mL or ELF ≥9~  2. FibroScan with transient elastography ≥8.5 kPa and controlled attenuation parameter ≥280 dB.m-1~  3. ...

title: RapidMeta Hepatology | Resmetirom (THR-β Agonist) in MASH/NASH v1.0
